title: GE Aerospace Readies Takeoff With Its 'AI Wingmate' In Tow
snippet: As GE Aerospace taps AI to enhance inspections and predictive maintenance, GE stock just flew into buy range.

title: GE Aerospace turns to robots and ‘Lean’ methods to tackle jet engine repair crunch
snippet: GE is investing $300 million in upgrading their repair hub in Singapore to address the bottleneck in the aviation industry caused by overloaded repair shops and scarce parts. They are implementing automation and AI to increase efficiency, reduce costs, and improve turnaround time. However, the industry’s supply squeeze is expected to continue, and it will […]

title: GE Aerospace Plans $300 Million Upgrade In Singapore Repair Facility
snippet: GE Aerospace announces $300M multi-year investment in Singapore to modernize engine repair operations with AI, automation, and digitization, improving turnaround times, safety, and service efficiency.
